    Method
    Description
    BookBuilder.EnchantedBookBuilder
    BookBuilder.EnchantedBookBuilder.addEnchants(Map<org.bukkit.enchantments.Enchantment,Integer> enchants)
    Adds a map of enchantments to the book with level restrictions enabled.
    BookBuilder.EnchantedBookBuilder
    BookBuilder.EnchantedBookBuilder.addEnchants(Map<org.bukkit.enchantments.Enchantment,Integer> enchants, boolean ignoreLevelRestriction)
    Adds a map of enchantments to the book.
    BookBuilder.EnchantedBookBuilder
    BookBuilder.EnchantedBookBuilder.addStoredEnchant(org.bukkit.enchantments.Enchantment enchantment)
    Adds a stored enchantment to the book with level 1 and level restrictions enabled.
    BookBuilder.EnchantedBookBuilder
    BookBuilder.EnchantedBookBuilder.addStoredEnchant(org.bukkit.enchantments.Enchantment enchantment, int level)
    Adds a stored enchantment to the book with level restrictions enabled.
    BookBuilder.EnchantedBookBuilder
    BookBuilder.EnchantedBookBuilder.addStoredEnchant(org.bukkit.enchantments.Enchantment enchantment, int level, boolean ignoreLevelRestriction)
    Adds a stored enchantment to the book.
    BookBuilder.EnchantedBookBuilder
    BookBuilder.EnchantedBookBuilder.clearEnchants()
    Clears all stored enchantments from the enchanted book.
    BookBuilder.EnchantedBookBuilder
    BookBuilder.getEnchantedBookBuilder()
    Constructs a new EnchantedBookBuilder for manipulating enchanted books.
    BookBuilder.EnchantedBookBuilder
    BookBuilder.EnchantedBookBuilder.removeStoredEnchant(org.bukkit.enchantments.Enchantment enchantment)
    Removes a specific stored enchantment from the enchanted book.
    BookBuilder.EnchantedBookBuilder
    BookBuilder.EnchantedBookBuilder.setEnchants(Map<org.bukkit.enchantments.Enchantment,Integer> enchants)
    Sets a map of enchantments to the book with level restrictions enabled.
    BookBuilder.EnchantedBookBuilder
    BookBuilder.EnchantedBookBuilder.setEnchants(Map<org.bukkit.enchantments.Enchantment,Integer> enchants, boolean ignoreLevelRestriction)
    Sets a map of enchantments to the book, replacing any existing enchantments.
